svg.title: Feasto system architecture diagram
svg.desc: FastAPI application connecting to Client at top, then PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Redis, Celery Beat, Supabase S3, Razorpay, and Resend as service dependencies below.
svg.text: role-based auth · async SQLAlchemy · Pydantic v2
PostgreSQL is Supabase-hosted · DB trigger keeps Geography column in sync with lat/lon
